description: Builder picks up a single ready task asking to add a tiny marker file. Fixture passes when the marker file exists and the task has moved out of ready/.

provenance.justification: Proves the fixture → workflow → predicate plumbing works end-to-end on the minimum-viable builder path (one ready task, one file edit, one task-state move). Orthogonal to the real-failure fixtures alongside it: a regression fixture proves the agent still handles a specific past failure; this proves the harness wiring is not itself broken.
